title: Undead Adventures + [Port]
description: An unofficial port of the now deleted Undead Adventures + modpack by flowstate
body:
An Unofficial port of the now deleted UndeadAdventures+ Modpack made by flowstate ! 

This modpack is made for Forge 1.20.1 and mainly focuses on making it feels like you're surviving a zombie apocalypse all along.

It includes various mods, including some weaponery mods, traps to defend yourself and more.

Here are some ingame screenshots taken with the modpack :


![UA+ 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c70f12e200b03f01ca51f0ce95edff51ab96ccca.jpeg)

![UA+ 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81ee455ac10bcf49f3fb3ac70fedeb6fd885fd0a.jpeg)

![UA+ 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e785b90e3f2b59cd0c6e83dd603732dbd122fe4e.jpeg)


Here's also flow's video with the modpack to show more of it :)


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/EE5hRE4YR2A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Modpack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Error Messages, Game Not Launching, Specific mods crashing the game...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !

Copyrights :
- Trade cycling mod - https://modrinth.com/mod/trade-cycling

Removed Mods & Texture Packs due to copyrights :
- Physics Mod
- TZP
- Better Villages
- Cupboard
- Hostile Villages
